---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report unclear documentation or suggest improvements
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## 📖 Documentation Issue

What documentation needs improvement?

## 🔍 Location

Where is this documentation issue located?
- File/URL: [e.g., README.md, docs/setup.md]
- Section: [e.g., "Installation", "Architecture"]

## ❓ What's Unclear?

Describe what's confusing or missing:
- What did you expect to find?
- What's currently unclear?
- What information would help?

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

How could this documentation be improved?
- Suggested wording or additions
- Examples that would help
- Links to resources

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context here:
- Screenshots of unclear sections
- Related documentation issues
- External references

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked if this documentation issue already exists
- [ ] I can clearly describe what needs improvement
- [ ] I understand this is about docs, not code functionality
